title: region — settings
description: Tenant-scoped policy for region provisioning + retention + reconciliation behaviour. Compliance floors clamp retention_days up when the tenant's regulatory profile requires it (financial-record retention floor: 730 days).

groups.label: Regions
groups.description: Tenant-wide policy for commercial + regulatory zones.

fields.name: async_seed
fields.label: Seed default region asynchronously
fields.helpText: When on, the default region is provisioned on a background queue immediately after tenant creation. Off = the default region is created inside the tenant-provisioning transaction (slower but the tenant is never briefly regionless).

fields.name: require_tax_config_on_create
fields.label: Require tax config when creating a region
fields.helpText: When on, POST /regions refuses without a fully-formed tax_config. When off, defaults from the country's shipped defaults auto-fill.

fields.name: reject_unknown_country_code
fields.label: Reject unknown country codes
fields.helpText: When on, region create refuses country codes not in the shipped defaults table. Off = accept any ISO 3166-1 code (needed for supranational zones).

sections.label: Reconciliation
sections.description: How the system heals default-region drift.

fields.name: alert_on_drift
fields.label: Alert on default-region drift
fields.helpText: When on, the reconciler pages ops on drift (a tenant with 0 or 2+ default regions). Off = drift is only logged.

fields.name: auto_heal
fields.label: Auto-heal drift
fields.helpText: When on, the reconciler auto-heals drift (promote-oldest OR re-seed-from-country_code). Off by default — surface + acknowledge before healing.

sections.label: Retention
sections.description: How long archived regions are kept.

fields.name: archived_regions_retention_days
fields.label: Days to hold archived regions
fields.helpText: Days a soft-deleted (archived) region stays recoverable. Compliance floor: 730 days (2 years — financial record retention). Enterprise tenants may extend up to 2555 (7 years).
